nodes.name: 非洲林秧鸡属
nodes.summary: 非洲林秧鸡属（Canirallus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Madagascar forest rail、Grey-throated rail。

nodes.name: Grey-throated rail
nodes.summary: The grey-throated rail (Canirallus oculeus) is a species of bird in the family Rallidae, the only member of the genus Canirallus. It is found in Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ivory Coast, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, Nigeria, and Sierra Leone. The genus Canirallus was formerly placed in the family Sarothruridae. The genus was moved to Rallidae when a molecular genetic study published in 2019 found that the grey-throated rail was more closely related to Rallidae than it was to Sarothruridae. References
